submission.subject: Escalation matrix for repeated SLA breaches
submission.description: Hi SLA Compliance team, our open ticket INC0010019 has now crossed the 95% SLA threshold twice in three weeks. Could you confirm the formal escalation matrix that applies under our SILVER-tier contract, who the L2/L3 contacts are, and how we should attach evidence on the portal?

samples.label: Path B — angry / vague breach complaint

submission.subject: Multiple SLA breaches across our account
submission.description: We have been seeing several issues across our open queries with response times slipping. This is impacting us. Please escalate internally and let us know what corrective action is being taken.
